system.Text:
When __you flee or withdraw from a site__, consider the situation and your approach. If you...

  * Find the fastest way out: Roll +edge.
  * Fight your way out: Roll +iron.
  * Keep out of sight or in disguise: Roll +shadow.
  * Retrace your steps or locate an alternate path: Roll +wits.

On a __strong hit__, you make your way safely out of the site. Take +1 momentum.

On a __weak hit__, you find your way out, but this place exacts its price. Choose one.

  * You suffer costs en route: Make a suffer move (-2), or two suffer moves (-1).
  * You leave behind something important.
  * You face a new complication as you emerge from the depths.
  * A denizen plots their revenge.

On a __miss__, a dire threat or imposing obstacle stands in your way. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.06f78b87b9532437]{Reveal a Danger}. If you survive, you may make your escape.

Trigger.Text: When you flee or withdraw from a site...

Options.Text: Keep out of sight or in disguise
Retrace your steps or locate an alternate path

Strong Hit.Text: On a __strong hit__, you make your way safely out of the site. Take +1 momentum.

Weak Hit.Text:
On a __weak hit__, you find your way out, but this place exacts its price. Choose one.

  * You suffer costs en route: Make a suffer move (-2), or two suffer moves (-1).
  * You leave behind something important.
  * You face a new complication as you emerge from the depths.
  * A denizen plots their revenge.

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, a dire threat or imposing obstacle stands in your way. @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.06f78b87b9532437]{Reveal a Danger}. If you survive, you may make your escape.
